title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Vedantu - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Vedantu - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Vedantu in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!
